definition: complete and total; not limited
example: You have absolute freedom to choose.

definition: to successfully finish something
example: She accomplished all her goals this year.

definition: correct and precise; without mistakes
example: Give an accurate description of what happened.

definition: to change to fit new conditions
example: Animals adapt to survive in cold climates.

definition: enough; acceptable but not great
example: Make sure you get adequate sleep.

definition: to change something slightly to make it better
example: Adjust the mirror before driving.

definition: to move forward; to make progress
example: Technology continues to advance every year.

definition: something that helps you succeed
example: Knowing the language is an advantage.

definition: to have an influence on something
example: Lack of sleep can affect your focus.

definition: to study something carefully to understand it
example: Analyze the data before making a conclusion.

definition: to make something known publicly
example: The teacher will announce the winner today.

definition: to come near to something; a way of dealing with something
example: We need a new approach to solve this problem.

definition: suitable for a particular situation
example: Wear appropriate clothing for the cold weather.

definition: to officially agree to something
example: The principal approved our plan.

definition: a particular part or feature of something
example: The best aspect of the trip was the food.

definition: to believe something is true without proof
example: Don't assume you know the answer.

definition: to try to do something
example: Make an attempt to finish the puzzle.

definition: the way you think and feel about something
example: A positive attitude helps you learn faster.

definition: the power to make decisions; a trusted expert
example: The police have authority to enforce the law.

definition: able to be used or obtained
example: Are there any seats available?

definition: the middle value; typical or ordinary
example: My average score this semester is 90.

definition: to keep away from something
example: Avoid eating too much sugar.

definition: equal weight on both sides; a state of stability
example: Balance the scale with equal weights.

definition: having the ability to do something
example: You are capable of achieving great things.

definition: a difficult task that tests your abilities
example: Learning a new language is a challenge.

definition: to share information with others
example: We communicate using words and gestures.

definition: a group of people living in the same area or sharing interests
example: Our community built a new park.

definition: made of many parts; difficult to understand
example: The human brain is very complex.

definition: a worry or interest about something
example: My main concern is finishing on time.

definition: the state something is in; a requirement
example: The road is in poor condition after the storm.

definition: a serious disagreement or fight
example: The characters had a conflict in the story.

definition: to think carefully about something
example: Consider all options before deciding.

definition: happening all the time without stopping
example: The rain has been constant all week.

definition: the situation or background that helps explain something
example: Read the sentence in context to understand it.

definition: the difference between two things
example: There is a strong contrast between day and night.

definition: to give something, like time or effort, to help
example: Everyone can contribute to a clean environment.

definition: to persuade someone to believe or do something
example: She convinced me to join the team.

definition: to work together with others
example: We must cooperate to finish on time.

definition: the ability to do something scary or difficult
example: It takes courage to try something new.

definition: the customs and beliefs of a group of people
example: Korean culture values hard work and family.

definition: eager to learn or know about something
example: I am curious about how stars form.

definition: a choice you make after thinking
example: Making a good decision takes practice.

definition: to say something officially or clearly
example: The team declared victory after winning.

definition: to explain the meaning of a word or idea
example: Can you define the word 'curious'?

definition: to show how something works
example: The teacher will demonstrate the experiment.

definition: to rely on someone or something
example: I depend on my alarm clock to wake up.

definition: to discover or decide something after thinking
example: Determine which answer is correct.

definition: what makes one thing unlike another
example: What is the difference between these two words?

definition: to recognize the difference between things
example: Can you distinguish the two colors?

definition: to give out to several people
example: Please distribute the worksheets to the class.

definition: a wide variety of different things or people
example: Our class celebrates diversity.

definition: producing the desired result; successful
example: That was an effective solution to the problem.

definition: working well without wasting time or energy
example: This method is efficient and saves time.

definition: to completely remove or get rid of something
example: Eliminate all incorrect answers first.

definition: to give special importance to something
example: The teacher emphasized the importance of reading.

definition: to give someone support and confidence
example: My parents encourage me to practice piano.

definition: to judge the quality or value of something
example: Evaluate each answer carefully.

definition: information that helps prove something is true
example: The scientist looked for evidence of water on Mars.

definition: to give one thing and get another in return
example: We exchanged gifts at the party.

definition: to become or make something larger
example: The city is expanding rapidly.

definition: very great in degree; at the far end
example: The weather was at an extreme cold today.

definition: well known or easily recognized
example: That song sounds familiar.

definition: an important part or quality of something
example: The best feature of the phone is its camera.

definition: able to change or adapt easily
example: Be flexible when plans change.

definition: to concentrate on one thing
example: Focus on one task at a time.

definition: following official rules or conventions
example: Wear formal clothing to the ceremony.

definition: to produce or create something
example: Solar panels generate electricity.

definition: relating to the whole world
example: Climate change is a global problem.

definition: to control and make rules for a group or country
example: Elected leaders govern the country.

definition: to recognize and name something
example: Can you identify this bird?

definition: to put a plan into action
example: We will implement the new schedule next week.

definition: the effect one thing has on another
example: Reading has a big impact on your vocabulary.

definition: a single person or thing; personal
example: Every individual has unique talents.

definition: to present someone or something for the first time
example: Let me introduce my new classmate.

definition: to give reasons to show something is right
example: Can you justify your decision?

definition: to keep something in its current state
example: Maintain good posture while sitting.

definition: very important or large
example: This is a major improvement!
